sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Wait until the IT Support re-assign the Incident to the engineers
Set Operational Status to 'Non-Operational'
Set Operational Status to 'Repair in Progress'
Incident for detected Box
Send an email to the Engineer assign to the targeted Box
Assign engineer based on the Box
Wait until engineer will close the Incident
Set Operational Status to 'Repair in Progress'
Wait until engineer will close the Incident
Wait until the IT Support re-assign the Incident to the engineers
Send an email to the Engineer assign to the targeted Box
Assign engineer based on the Box

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: We are checking if the Incident was created via Record Producer.
We are checking if the Incident was NOT created via Record Producer.

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Set Operational Status to 'Non-Operational'
Wait until the IT Support re-assign the Incident to the engineers
Assign engineer based on the Box
Wait until engineer will close the Incident
Wait until the IT Support re-assign the Incident to the engineers
Set Operational Status to 'Repair in Progress'
Set Operational Status to 'Repair in Progress'
Send an email to the Engineer assign to the targeted Box
Incident for detected Box
Assign engineer based on the Box
Wait until engineer will close the Incident
Send an email to the Engineer assign to the targeted Box

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: We are checking if the Incident was NOT created via Record Producer.
We are checking if the Incident was created via Record Producer.
